title: jurinea helichrysifolia
intro: Jurinea helichrysifolia, also known as Jurinea or Mountain Helichrysum, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) native to Central Asia and Eastern Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jurinea helichrysifolia include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and anticancer properties. Jurinea helichrysifolia is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions.
